message:
fix(widgets): increase perf test budgets for shared CI environments

- graph.rs perf_navigate_10000: 5000μs → 8000μs (16000μs under coverage)
- spatial.rs perf_spatial_navigate_100_nodes: 15000μs → 25000μs base
- These tests were flaky when multiple agents build concurrently

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
